---
title: "editable Example"
format:
  revealjs: default
revealjs-plugins:
  - editable
filters:
  - editable
---

## In the morning

![](image.png){.absolute width=519.9px height=575px left=0px top=89px}

::: {.absolute width=490px height=156px left=572px top=128px}
I think that I shall never **see**

A poem lovely as a [tree]{style='color: rgb(0, 138, 0)'}.

From “Trees” by Joyce Kilmer
:::
